skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Professional design toolkit with ten curated color and font themes for styling presentations, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
skill.summary: Apply curated color palettes and font pairings to visual artifacts.
skill.author: ArtemisAI

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported 67 potential issues, but contextual review found false positives. Backtick matches are markdown formatting, weak crypto and C2 matches are license text, prose, or color values. No evidence found of prompt injection, code execution, data exfiltration, or malicious intent.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Apache License URLs
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL detections are standard Apache License reference links. They are plain license text and do not trigger network requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are inside LICENSE.txt and contain official Apache License URLs. There is no executable code or network API call at those locations.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks
low_findings.description: The command execution detections are markdown inline code spans around file names and hex color values. They are documentation, not shell execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every cited location is markdown content in SKILL.md or theme definition files. No Ruby, shell, script block, or command runner appears in context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Crypto and C2 Keywords
low_findings.description: The weak crypto and C2 detections come from Apache License wording, theme prose, color names, and hex color values. No cryptographic use or C2 behavior exists.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The suspicious tokens are ordinary words or color specifications in non-executable markdown. Review found no algorithms, sockets, beacons, callbacks, or external endpoints.

content.user_title: Apply Cohesive Themes to Visual Artifacts
content.value_statement: Consistent visual styling takes time and design judgment. Theme Factory provides curated themes that help Claude, Codex, and Claude Code style artifacts quickly.
actual_capabilities: Provides ten named themes with color palettes and font pairings.
Guides users to review a visual showcase before selecting a theme.
Applies selected theme guidance to slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
Creates a custom theme when preset themes do not fit the artifact.
Maps each theme to suitable presentation contexts and audiences.
limitations: It does not include executable styling automation or scripts.
Final appearance depends on the target artifact and rendering platform.
Font availability may vary across local systems and applications.
Custom themes are generated from user input, not formal brand guidelines.

use_cases.title: Executive Deck Styling
use_cases.description: Apply a polished theme to board decks, quarterly reviews, or investor presentations that need consistent visual structure.

use_cases.title: Technical Report Design
use_cases.description: Use clean palettes and readable font pairings to improve documentation, architecture reports, and implementation summaries.

use_cases.title: Campaign Asset Theming
use_cases.description: Select or generate a visual theme for landing pages, marketing decks, and launch materials.

prompt_templates.title: Browse Themes
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the theme showcase so I can choose a style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request to view preset options before making changes.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to this presentation and keep the content unchanged.
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic request after the user has selected a specific preset.

prompt_templates.title: Recommend a Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Recommend the best theme for a healthcare technology report and explain the choice briefly.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request when the user wants design guidance.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a sustainability strategy deck with calm colors and modern typography.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request when preset themes do not match the artifact.

output_examples.output: The assistant presents the showcase and summarizes options such as Ocean Depths, Forest Canopy, Modern Minimalist, and Tech Innovation.

output_examples.input: Apply Arctic Frost to my slides.
output_examples.output: The assistant updates the deck with a cool winter palette, crisp contrast, and matching sans serif typography.

output_examples.input: Create a theme for a finance workshop.
output_examples.output: The assistant proposes a trustworthy finance theme with restrained colors, clear hierarchy, and professional font pairings.

best_practices: Review the showcase before choosing a theme.
Match the theme to the audience, industry, and artifact purpose.
Check contrast and font rendering after the theme is applied.
anti_patterns: Mixing several themes inside one artifact weakens visual consistency.
Choosing a theme only by personal taste can reduce audience fit.
Changing many theme values after selection defeats the curated system.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes ten preset themes with named palettes, font pairings, and recommended use contexts.

faq.question: Can it create a new theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a custom theme from your description when the presets do not fit.

faq.question: What artifacts can it style?
faq.answer: It is intended for slides, documents, reports, HTML landing pages, and similar visual artifacts.

faq.question: Does it run scripts or install packages?
faq.answer: No. The skill contains markdown guidance and theme specifications, not executable scripts.

faq.question: Will fonts always look the same?
faq.answer: Not always. Font rendering depends on the application, operating system, and available fonts.

faq.question: Which theme is best for corporate work?
faq.answer: Ocean Depths and Modern Minimalist are strong starting points for corporate decks and reports.
